code:
%%{HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> Idle: App Start
    
    Idle --> Recording: Start Recording
    Recording --> Paused: Pause
    Paused --> Recording: Resume
    Recording --> Saving: Stop Recording
    Paused --> Saving: Stop Recording
    Saving --> Idle: Save Complete
    
    Idle --> Loading: Load Session
    Loading --> Ready: Session Loaded
    Ready --> Playing: Play
    Playing --> Paused2: Pause
    Paused2 --> Playing: Resume
    Playing --> Ready: Stop/Complete
    Ready --> Idle: Close Session
    
    state Recording {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> Capturing
        Capturing --> Capturing: Packet Received
        Capturing --> BufferFull: Buffer Limit
        BufferFull --> Flushing: Auto-flush
        Flushing --> Capturing: Flush Complete
    }
    
    state Playing {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> Emitting
        Emitting --> Waiting: Packet Emitted
        Waiting --> Emitting: Delay Complete
        Emitting --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]: Last Packet
    }
    
    note right of Recording
        Captures:
        - Timestamp
        - Direction
        - Raw hex
        - Decoded JSON
        - Action name
    end note
    
    note right of Playing
        Replay Options:
        - Speed: 0.5x - 4x
        - Seek to position
        - Step forward/back
        - Filter by action
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech诊断引擎设计一个状态图，核心是LabAnalyzer的生命周期管理。从应用启动开始，先进入Idle空闲状态，然后可以开始录制或加载历史会话。
明白了，Idle是中心枢纽。录制流程我理解为：Start Recording进入Recording状态，可以Pause到Paused，Resume回来，Stop Recording则去Saving，最后Save Complete回到Idle。这样对吗？
对，Paused也能直接Stop Recording去Saving。另外加载流程是：Idle通过Load Session到Loading，Session Loaded后进入Ready状态，然后可以Play进入Playing。
Playing的暂停我注意到需要区分状态，建议用Paused2，Resume回到Playing，Stop/Complete回到Ready，Close Session最终回到Idle。这样两个暂停状态不会混淆。
好，Paused2区分清楚。现在细化Recording内部：要有Capturing持续抓包，Packet Received是自循环，Buffer Limit时进入BufferFull，然后Auto-flush到Flushing，Flush Complete回到Capturing。
已添加Recording复合状态。Playing内部也设计了：Emitting开始，Packet Emitted后到Waiting，Delay Complete返回Emitting，Last Packet则输出到HealthTech_PatientRecords。
需要补充两个注释：Recording右侧注明捕获的字段——Timestamp、Direction、Raw hex、Decoded JSON、Action name；Playing右侧注明Replay Options，包括Speed 0.5x-4x、Seek、Step和Filter by action。
全部完成。Idle作为起点，录制和回放两大流程清晰分离，内部子状态处理缓冲和时序控制，注释明确了数据格式和回放功能。
